dsl_rule.translation_notes: Mean reversion signal translated using z-score (zscore_20) to detect deviation from mean in stationary series. Entry triggered when price deviates >1 standard deviation from mean (positive z-score for short, negative for long). Exit when price reverts to mean (z-score crosses zero). Stop loss set conservatively at 2% as parameters were author-silent. Hold period set to 20 days for short-term mean reversion exploitation. Target regime set to RANGING as mean reversion works best in non-trending markets.

source_rule_text: Trade mean reversion in stationary price series or portfolios, exploiting short-term reversal opportunities even in nonstationary series.
